case_title: AMERICAN CHIROPRATIC CENTER, MARKUS STRIEBECK VS. STEVEN BALDIN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHIROPRATIC CENTER, MARKUS STRIEBECK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALDIN, STEVEN $7,655.00 PRINCIPAL, $172.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,827.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
